message:
test(inference): add inference ledger tests and fixtures

Add new test infrastructure for inference ledger:

crates/pt-core/tests/inference_ledger_nomock.rs:
- Add no-mock inference ledger tests

crates/pt-core/tests/fixtures/:
- Add inference test fixtures (input/expected)

test/fixtures/pt-core/:
- Add inference regression test data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:

+}
